query:
SELECT ri.id, ri.catalog_id, ri.current_hp, ri.base_hp, ri.is_active, bc.name
FROM roaming_boss_instances ri
LEFT JOIN roaming_boss_catalog bc ON ri.catalog_id = bc.id
ORDER BY ri.id;
